message: To pray is to think about the meaning of life.
Ludwig Josef Johann Wittgenstein   June 11, 1916

name: Kimura
message: "Do we really have to hike up this mountain? Aren't there buses that go to the village?"

name: Master
message: "Jeez, what are you complaining for now? It's not that far. No one asked you to come, anyway."

name: Kimura
message: "Will Hasaki be okay walking so far?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm just fine."
A summer day.
We walked along the side of the road.
The rays of a summer sun pierced us.
A blue sky stretched overhead.
Great white clouds dotted the sky.
The trees were full of green.
We walked through just such a scene.
Every time the wind blew, I smelled the wild grass.
The babbling of a brook.
The smell of earth under our feet.
My father was born in this town.
It was called Sawaimura.
I know a lot about this village.
For instance, I know the autumn breeze.
The season when the valleys of Sawaimura are dyed with a beautiful scarlet sunset.
When I first saw the trees bathed in scarlet, I was at a loss for words.
When they saw that, Tomo Nii-san and Yuki-san laughed at me.
For instance, I know the chill of winter.
The winters here are colder than in Tokyo.
The clouds floating in from the ocean sprinkle endless snowflakes upon the village.
During the winter, all the children romp through a snowy wonderland.
Throwing snowballs, building snowmen, and even constructing little igloos.
For a child, it was heaven on Earth.
That's one of the best memories I have of my childhood.
For instance, I know the greening spring.
The spring in Sawaimura brings change to every pastoral landscape.
The white land is suddenly alive with green. The cherry blossoms fall upon yesterday's snows.
The one season when the cherry blossoms are free to dance.
The season where we see life in all its vigor.
And the budding of new, green leaves on all the trees.
I like the cherry blossoms, but I love to watch the green buds upon the zelkova's branches.
The sun filtering through an early spring canopy is perhaps more precious than any of the world's treasures.
Then, when the verdant green of the zelkova gradually deepens into a lusher shade...
Summer comes.
The summer in Sawaimura is hot and muggy.
The beams of the sun seem to illuminate the entire world.
But the shade under a tree's boughs can be far cooler than any shelter from the sun in Tokyo.
Sawaimura is just such a village.

name: Kimura
message: "So... why did we come all the way out here again?"

name: Kimura
message: "I understand that he finally got out on bail and all, but this whole trip is just a pain in the butt if you ask me."
I was finally starting to enjoy the atmosphere out here in the mountains when Kimura-san spoiled the mood with his complaints.

name: Hasaki
message: "You're ruining the atmosphere."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? How am I doing that?"

name: Master
message: "We're finally out here in the country, and all you do is complain. It's not like we asked you to come, either. You just decided to tag along."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, I guess so... But this is my job, you know?"

name: Master
message: "Oh, come on. We already know that he's not going to be convicted. There's no way you're going to find any dirt to base a good article on."

name: Kimura
message: "Sure, but there are still a lot of people out there that are interested in what happened."

name: Master
message: "You don't get it, do you? If you write about what happened in this village, I'll kill you."

name: Kimura
message: "Eek!"

name: Master
message: "This is a peaceful village. Don't disturb the peace."

name: Kimura
message: "Yes, sir. As you say."
The end of summer.
It was a month after that happened.
For some reason, it was decided that a ceremony would be held in honor of my father.
That's why we were walking along this same familiar road.
The same road where we walked next to our father.
I walked this same road the first time I came to Sawaimura with my father.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"
The promised place.
That's how I thought of it back then.
Even now, this place makes my heart race.
Last time, I was here with my father.
Even then, my heart was racing.
It was the first time I met my Nii-san. I heard that we lived together three years before that, but I was too young to remember.
I didn't know what kind of person he was.
My heart raced with anticipation.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki."
The person who turned to look at me was... my brother.
It was just like the first time we met.
He looked scary, but he was actually an incredibly kind brother.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, did we make you wait?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I've been standing here for ages. Jeez, look at the time."

name: Master
message: "Wow. Why do you have an alarm clock with you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The people in this village don't pay much attention to the time, and it's not like I own a wristwatch."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? What about your cellphone?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you stupid? There's no way I'd get a signal out here."

name: Kimura
message: "What did you say?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Th-That's scary. Wh-What if there was an emergency and someone got hurt?"

name: Master
message: "I told you, no one asked you to come. Go home if you want."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, why did you come, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'm investigating."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, are you now? You're such a good little reporter. Just so you know, I'll kill you if you write an article about what happened in this village."

name: Kimura
message: "Eek!"

name: Kimura
message: "No! Don't make fun of my D3 like that!"

name: Master
message: "Jeez, this guy really gets on my nerves."

name: Kimura
message: "So you really did get out on bail."

name: Tomosane
message: "They did say that they wanted to help me blend into society again some day."

name: Kimura
message: "And there was a lot of evidence that you really did have multiple personalities."

name: Kimura
message: "And you even got stabbed while you were trying to stop that accident from happening."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm surprised they didn't want to put me in an institution or something, though."

name: Kimura
message: "But... Mamiya Takuji-kun is gone now."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right."
Mamiya Takuji's personality never surfaced again after that day.
Or rather, no one else's personality ever took control of my body again.
From the time I wake up in the morning until the time I sleep at night, I live my life normally, without a hint of discontinuity.
All the symptoms of dissociative identity disorder were completely cured.

name: Kimura
message: "Well, Mamiya Takuji-kun accomplished his objective. He'll never appear again."

name: Master
message: "Let's get going. We have to walk to the Mamiya house."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? We have to walk more?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Of course we do. You should really go home, Kimura-san."

name: Kimura
message: "Don't say that. You're being too cold."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm back."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Tomosane. You're early."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... Yuki-san, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. It's me, Yuki-nee. It's been a while, Hasaki-chan."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Wh-What's wrong? Let's go inside already."

name: Master
message: "Yeah..."
When I was released, I was entrusted to this village.

I'm sure that part of it was just because they didn't want the mass media to harass me, but I'm also certain that's not the only reason why the doctors decided this village would be the best place for me.
So now I have to travel to the nearest city once a week to see a psychologist.

name: Yuki
message: "So how did the mountain road here treat you after all this time?"

name: Hasaki
message: "How was it for you, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "I was born in this village, so I don't really care one way or another."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about? Earlier you were making a fuss because there's no Internet out here."

name: Yuki
message: "But how am I supposed to look stuff up in Uncy***pedia without the Internet? There's so much stuff I don't know!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who the hell uses Uncy***pedia to do research in the first place? At least use W***pedia to do it."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't underestimate the power of Uncy***pedia!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know about that."

name: Hasaki
message: "We all got here pretty early, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I didn't expect you guys till evening."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? You guys were still fifteen minutes late, and I was the one waiting up on you guys."
The end of summer.
Even at the end of summer, the sun shone high in the sky.
Cumulonimbi gathered strength far off in the distance.
Those clouds would probably rain torrents of water later.
The season was coming to an end.
The day of Dad's death had finally come.
It had been eight years since that day.
And so we all returned to that same village.
Sawaimura. It's the place where Hasaki and I met, and the place where I met Yuki and Master as well.
Well, I was living with Hasaki for a while before, but she was just a baby, so she didn't remember me.
Tomorrow they would hold a ceremony for my father.
Though this year wasn't actually a notable anniversary of his death.
The closest would be the tenth anniversary, but it still hadn't been quite ten years.
But our grandmother who still lives here said that it was normal to hold a ceremony for the 7th anniversary of a death in the Buddhist tradition.
I told her that it'd actually been eight years since he died, of course.
I think that this ceremony was really being held for my sake.
It had been a long time since I came back to this village.
I don't care about those stuffy Buddhist anniversary traditions, but I'm sure a lot of my old acquaintances would come back to the village if we held an event.
That's probably why they were doing it.
A monk came to see us at the temple.
He recited some kind of sutra.
I listened to the boring sutra.
"Will he just get on with it already..."
That's all I was thinking.
I appreciated all the stuff that my grandmother was doing for me, but it was honestly just a pain.
I looked out the window.
The bright rays of the sun still rained down on the land outside.

name: Yuki
message: "The sky is blue today."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't talk while the monk is reciting the sutras."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't you like the blue sky?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You were the one who said you hated it."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? I told you that I really like blue skies after that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, but that's only because it's easier to light a cigarette when the weather is good."

name: Yuki
message: "What, is that not a good enough reason for you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Didn't you hate blue skies, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I mean, yeah. Don't you think the sky is really scary?"

name: Hasaki
message: "The sky is scary..."

name: Yuki
message: "Because I fell from the sky once."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, now that you mention it, I fell twice."

name: Yuki
message: "But you're still alive, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "The first time it was me, and the second time, it was Tomosane who protected you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, but I actually survived doing it."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha. That's because you're a hero. Heroes don't die."

name: Tomosane
message: "Heroes don't die, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "When the ceremony is over, let's go see the sunflowers again."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that sounds good."

name: Yuki
message: "Let's go!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki, will you be okay? It's a long walk."

name: Hasaki
message: "Of course I'll be okay. I climbed that hill when I was really little."

name: Tomosane
message: "But you were used to living out in the sticks. Now you're used to the city."

name: Yuki
message: "If she can't walk anymore, then you can just carry her. There's no problem."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't decide that for me!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong? Aren't you the hero here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why does a hero have to act like a servant now?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Whoa, it's amazing."

name: Tomosane
message: "There are so many sunflowers."

name: Yuki
message: "This is the first time I've seen them this year too."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "I knew you were coming, so the two of us decided we wanted to see them together with you."
Decided...
We didn't really make a decision like that, but we had a sort of unspoken agreement.
But if we were going to go see them, there's no reason why we wouldn't wait for Hasaki to be with us.
This hill is one of those places.

name: Hasaki
message: "I didn't know the sunflowers were so big."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, they're huge."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha. I've grown a lot since last time, so I thought they would look way smaller."

name: Yuki
message: "Either way, sunflowers are still taller than a person. You're closer to the flower now, so they probably look even bigger than before."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's right. I was so small that I could barely see the tops of them."

name: Yuki
message: "That's probably it. And besides that, there are things in the world that are always going to be bigger than you, no matter how much you grow."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, the sunflowers will always, always be big."

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong? You haven't said anything in a while."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "What? You think the sunflowers are still just depressing? You always said they look like they're reaching out to the dead."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I don't really think that anymore."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, well that's good."

name: Tomosane
message: "You think?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, yeah. They don't need to face toward the dead anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "So there are no flowers that reach out to the dead now..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Come on, let's keep going!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah!"
We climbed up that same hilly road.
Hasaki laughed and played as we walked.
When she was young, it was really hard for her to climb this hill.
Even that foggy hilltop in the distance, which she thought she could never reach,
was now a pleasant walk to the top.
That was a scene which changed with the passing of time.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wow!"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's so pretty!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Wow, wow, I can't believe how big the sky is!"

name: Yuki
message: "So this is what it looks like from the top of the hill."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah."
Even in my memory, the view from the hill was always beautiful.
But at that moment, it was even more beautiful than I remembered.
It was a perfectly ordinary landscape.
It was a perfectly ordinary world.
This scene will probably never, ever change.
And it was very beautiful.

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How long do you have?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "If only you could be here forever. But we both know that you can't."

name: Yuki
message: "The sky is so pretty."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "If this was some eroge, then you'd find out that I was just a vengeful spirit, and the real Yuki-san was actually living her life without a clue about what was happening."

name: Tomosane
message: "But you have a grave and everything."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's been quite a while since my body was cremated and turned into ash."
The night that I came to Sawaimura...
Yuki came back to me.
But unlike before, her personality didn't take the place of mine.
She just hung around in my vicinity, like some kind of ghost.

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you a ghost?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows? Maybe I'm just proof that your brain still isn't working like it should."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then you're a hallucination?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't you think so?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because if I'm not, then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "If not, then what?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san, there are clovers over here!"

name: Yuki
message: "Seriously?! Then there might be a four-leaf clover!"
A giggling Yuki ran over to Hasaki.
A hallucination...
If she was a hallucination, then the fact that Hasaki could see her too means that...
I looked up at the blue sky.
The sky is the most distant world that a human can ever lay eyes upon.
You could even say the distance separating us from that world is infinite.
And that's what we have hanging above us at all times, spread over our heads.
If you think about it, that's really bizarre.
We live on the ground, surrounded by finite things. Small things. Things which change as time passes. Those are the things we're surrounded by as we live out our lives.
We live out our normal lives surrounded by those things.
But directly above us, there's something that none of us can ever reach. None of us can ever know where that limit even lies. The infinite is always spread over our heads.
Hanging above this common scene, there is an infinite vastness which is always present.
That's just the world we live in.

name: Tomosane
message: "It is not how things are in the world that is mystical, but that it exists."

name: Yuki
message: "Feeling the world as a limited whole―it is this that is mystical... Right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's it."

name: Tomosane
message: "How's your search for a four-leaf clover going?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I can't find any at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that so?"
The two of them were trying with all their might to find a four-leaf clover.
Why do they need to find something like that?
I remember searching for four-leaf clovers when I was a child.
But I never managed to find one.
A four-leaf clover...
For some reason, that word made me recall the image of a golden angel in my memory.
One golden angel is worth a prize toy.
By the way, you can get a prize for five silver angels too.
It's just that in my mind, the four-leaf clover that I could never find is like one of those rare golden angels, since you could trade just one golden angel for a prize.
When I told Hasaki about it, she said...

name: Hasaki
message: "I've never seen a gold angel, but the silver ones aren't that hard to get. I've seen a bunch of those."
Then you've gotten the prize before?

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahaha. I collected four, but I could never get the last one. Pretty soon, I forgot about it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then I remembered when I finally found another one. 'Oh, I had four of these before.'"
She had four at one point, but she lost them somewhere.
Even though she carefully collected them for so long, eventually she lost interest and forgot about them.
When she finally found the last one, she remembered that she'd been collecting them.

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm... I can't find any four-leaf clovers."
If you can't find it, then you need to keep looking.
You can just keep looking until you find it.
But once you do find it...
If Yuki or Hasaki really did find that lucky four-leaf clover here on the hill, then...
Well... That's why it's probably better that she didn't find that last angel.
It's better to have one last something to look for.

name: Yuki
message: "Ah! Found one!"
Yuki yelled out.

name: Yuki
message: "I found you, my lucky four-leaf clover!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, you really did."
Yuki plucked the four-leaf clover.
The symbol of good luck.
The golden angel that is worth a prize all on its own.
Yuki laughed as she held the clover up to the sky.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, I didn't think I would actually find one."

name: Yuki
message: "These aren't as rare as I thought they were."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's because you guys were looking for it."

name: Yuki
message: "But seeing clovers makes me want to find one."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really? It makes you want to find one?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. If there's a plant that'll bring people happiness, then they'll go look for it."

name: Yuki
message: "That's just what people do."

name: Tomosane
message: "But once you find that plant..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Once you find it, the game is over."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why is that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because... a game can only be called a game if it has an end."

name: Tomosane
message: "There doesn't have to be."

name: Yuki
message: "There does. Once the sun goes down and the bell rings, telling you to go home, then you have to leave."

name: Yuki
message: "It's telling you that playtime is over."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why don't you just destroy the bell?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's crazy. That's terrorism you're talking about."

name: Yuki
message: "Without the bell, evening would turn into night, and pretty soon you wouldn't be able to play, either way."

name: Yuki
message: "In the darkness, you can't step on each other's shadows, you can't play in the sand, and you can't kick the can."

name: Yuki
message: "When the sun goes down, it has to end."

name: Yuki
message: "It has to end."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san..."

name: Yuki
message: "You two can be happy in the future, together."

name: Tomosane
message: "Stop messing around. Don't say something so selfish."

name: Yuki
message: "Is it selfish?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course it is. You're just going to disappear. Someone who selfishly disappears doesn't have the right to say that."

name: Yuki
message: "Someone who selfishly disappears? You disappeared on us for a long time too, didn't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But I came back after it all. I came back to you guys."

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, that's because you're the hero. That's the hero's special privilege."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not the hero, so now..."

name: Yuki
message: "Here, look."

name: Yuki
message: "The sun is already setting."

name: Yuki
message: "Playtime is over."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, you're..."

name: Yuki
message: "Playtime is over."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, it's almost time."
Yuki closed her eyes.
I could do nothing as I watched her.
Yuki had walked alongside me every day till now.
Yuki had walked alongside me as we climbed this hill.

Once I left...
&
Once I left this hill, it would be over...

name: Yuki
message: "Aren't you getting hungry yet?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I'm really hungry."

name: Yuki
message: "Let's put an end to playtime so we can go home and eat."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Um... Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "What is it, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Um, are you coming home with us?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? Of course I am."

name: Tomosane
message: "Besides, do you even get hungry?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a reason that people leave food on a dead person's grave, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh, that's not what I'm talking about."

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, let's get home."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, let's go!"
Yuki started running.
Hasaki chased after her.
I was a little shocked, but I walked after them anyway.
The three of us started to walk down the hill.
We walked down this hill which is closer to the sky than anywhere else.
The three of us walked down the hill together.

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, you're so slow, Tomosane! Come on, hurry up!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, you can't do that! Yuki-san, don't hug him so much! He's mine!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? You can tell?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I can tell. Did you think I couldn't see you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really? You can see me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Of course I can. I do have Sanami blood in my veins too."

name: Yuki
message: "You sound like you're into the occult."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't care about that occult stuff! And Yuki-san, stop touching him with your chest!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki, you're doing the same thing!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm your sister, so it doesn't matter!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on, Hasaki-chan. You shouldn't monopolize him."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm not monopolizing him or anything!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're just some kind of curse on him or something, Yuki-san. If you get too close to him, he might get sick or worse!"

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, that's too cruel! Don't discriminate against me just because I'm a ghost!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not my problem. Besides, I know..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Owww!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-saaaan, you did naughty things with Yuki-san, didn't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Wh-What?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Don't underestimate the power of the Sanami family. Jeez, you should just go rest in peace, Yuki-san."

name: Yuki
message: "The Sanami family has nothing to do with that. In the end, they didn't have any real powers, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "But I really do have those powers! And you're a ghost, so don't haunt my Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's no fun."

name: Hasaki
message: "I really am grateful for everything, but I don't like ghosts that try to steal my Tomo Nii-san in the night."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not going to steal him. He doesn't belong to anyone to begin with."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, he belongs to me!"

name: Yuki
message: "Does he really? That's really immoral, you know."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's better than doing dirty things with a ghost!"

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, this is..."

name: Hasaki
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, how are you having a conversation with Yuki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Because I can see her."

name: Tomosane
message: "How can you see her?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know. All I know is that I can see her."

name: Yuki
message: "What? Now Hasaki-chan is hallucinating too?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm not! Anyway, if you do dirty things with Tomo Nii-san again, I'll kill you."

name: Yuki
message: "But I'm already dead."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll kill you a second time!"

name: Yuki
message: "But I'm 007."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow, ow, ow, ow. Stop it, Hasaki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, Hasaki! I was the one who saved you! Don't be so mean!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Yuki, don't pull on me!"
Hasaki and Yuki were both giggling by now... and pulling me in opposite directions.
On one side was my sister.
On the other side was a ghost. Or maybe a hallucination?
I don't get it.
Then Yuki said something.

name: Yuki
message: "Wouldn't it be amazing having a girlfriend that's just in your head? I don't age, so I'll always be the cute Yuki-chan that you fell in love with."

name: Hasaki
message: "Shut up! You're just a ghost!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ghosts still have basic human rights."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, they don't! It's like you're saying that two-dimensional girls have human rights too!"

name: Yuki
message: "Why, you little..."
The sun fell in the sky, and a waning moon rose far off in the distance.
A perfectly ordinary world.
A perfectly ordinary life.
Could you call this ridiculous life we're living ordinary?

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan, you should really go find yourself a boyfriend. It's not healthy to be in love with your brother."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't want to hear that from a ghost."

name: Yuki
message: "Being a ghost isn't as bad as being his sister."

name: Hasaki
message: "That doesn't make sense!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haven't you ever heard of the story of the Peony Lantern? A romantic relationship with a dead person is never going to work out well!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's a story from a long time ago. Things are different now."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't think something like that will ever change! You'll suck the life out of Tomo Nii-san if you get too close to him!"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? Haven't you ever heard of a guardian angel?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's just superstition!"
I'm pretty sure talking about ghosts is already solidly in the realm of superstition...

name: Hasaki
message: "Besides, it said online that long distance relationships never last for very long."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... You kids are so spoiled nowadays."

name: Yuki
message: "In the Analects of Confucius, it says that distance is no obstacle if two people really love each other."

name: Hasaki
message: "There's way too much distance between a living person and a dead person!"

name: Yuki
message: "Love can conquer even that distance."

name: Hasaki
message: "That doesn't make sense!"
Neither do you.
Even after Dad's memorial ceremony ended, Yuki never disappeared.
Hasaki and I were the only ones who were ever able to see her.
Hasaki doesn't have to go to the hospital like I do, but the doctors would probably diagnose her with PTSD resulting from brain damage she suffered at the time of her fall.
We don't actually know why Hasaki and I can see Yuki.
We don't know if she's a ghost or just a hallucination.
Regardless, the two of us can talk with her, play with her, and even laugh along with her.
We don't know how long it'll last.
These happy times could even end tomorrow.
But that same statement applies to everything in our lives.
The Yuki in front of me could disappear at any moment. In truth, that same anxiety extends to every existence in this world.
So I won't think about it anymore.
The road that leads endlessly up the hill.
The peak that lies foggy in the distance.
It's just like our own journey through the world.
There's no use worrying about what lies at the peak.
We have only to enjoy the journey up the slope.
